fields.label: API Key
fields.helpText: Go to Formbricks -> Settings -> API Keys -> Add API Key

fields.label: Instance URL
fields.helpText: Your Formbricks instance URL (defaults to formbricks.com cloud)

healthcheck_config.description: Validates API key via Formbricks /me endpoint

metadata.summary: Formbricks open-source survey and feedback platform for in-app surveys, links, and website pop-ups.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Log in to Formbricks (app.formbricks.com or self-hosted).
2. Go to Settings -> API Keys.
3. Click 'Add API Key' and copy the key.
4. Paste the key here. If self-hosted, also enter your instance URL.
